name: African Squash and Yams (Futari)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hubbard squash, pared and cut into 1-inch pieces
2 medium yams or sweet potatoes, pared and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onion in oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Heat to boiling.
4. Reduce heat.
5. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes longer.
Makes 6 to 8 servings
